docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LERMAN, EMMA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LERMAN, EMMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SUTTER HEATH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LERMAN, EMMA AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTER HEATH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SUTTER HEATH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LERMAN, EMMA AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTER HEATH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
